title: Thelypteris tenerifrons
taxonomy: Thelypteris tenerifrons is classified as a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Thelypteris, which is a group of ferns that are native to the Americas. The family Thelypteridaceae is a family of ferns that are primarily found in the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Thelypteris tenerifrons is further classified as a species within the genus Thelypteris, which is a group of deciduous and semi-evergreen ferns. The classification of Thelypteris tenerifrons is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Phylum: Pteridophyta, Class: Polypodiopsida, Order: Polypodiales, Family: Thelypteridaceae, Genus: Thelypteris, Species: T. tenerifrons.
